assertions.reason: `cargo test --test core_config` passed `missing_credentials_fail_before_transport_attempts`, which is the observable proof for fast configuration failure before any transport attempt.

`cargo test --test core_config` passed both `explicit_overrides_win_over_environment_values` and `env_loaded_request_can_be_sent_to_a_loopback_server`, proving env-derived config and explicit override precedence through captured loopback requests.

`cargo test --test core_config` passed `default_base_url_is_used_for_missing_or_blank_overrides`, but the observed cargo-test surface only proves unset and whitespace-only base URL handling; it does not directly exercise the explicit empty-string override required by the contract.
`cargo test --test core_config` passed `blank_api_key_values_are_rejected_before_network`, which covers both empty-string and whitespace-only API keys with no outbound request.
`cargo test --test core_headers` passed `auth_org_and_project_headers_are_conditional`, confirming bearer auth is always sent and org/project headers are present only when configured.
`cargo test --test core_headers` passed `user_agent_defaults_and_overrides`, and the output captured the deterministic custom header `integration-suite/1.0 openai-rust/0.1.0`.

commands.observation: 2 tests passed in `core_headers`, including `auth_org_and_project_headers_are_conditional` and `user_agent_defaults_and_overrides`; output captured `integration-suite/1.0 openai-rust/0.1.0` for the custom user-agent case.

blockers: VAL-CORE-003 is not fully proven by the observed cargo-test output because the empty-string OPENAI_BASE_URL case is not directly exercised by the existing test binary output captured here.
summary: Ran the assigned mocked cargo validations successfully. VAL-CORE-001, 002, 004, 005, and 020 are proven by passing test output; VAL-CORE-003 remains blocked due to missing direct cargo-test evidence for the empty-string base URL override case.
